metadata.status_reason: hawaiilawreview.com is a live Squarespace site with direct PDF download links visible (Volume 48, etc.). Host is not registered in adapters/registry.py to SquarespaceAdapter, so it routes to GenericAdapter and the Squarespace-specific accordion structure isn't traversed. Needs registry registration to SquarespaceAdapter.

navigation.notes:
PDF links are siblings of title elements; no separate article pages.
Volume and issue data are in h1 and h3 tags.
